heading: Deputy Secretary of Agriculture; appointment
label: 2210 Deputy Secretary of Agriculture; appointment
text: There is established in the Department of Agriculture the position of Deputy Secretary of Agriculture, to be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.
notes: CodificationProvisions of this section which prescribed the basic compensation of the Under Secretary were omitted to conform to the provisions of act . See , Government Organization and Employees.July 31, 1956section 5314 of Title 5Section was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 514a of Title 5Pub. Amendments1976— substituted “Deputy Secretary of Agriculture” for “Under Secretary of Agriculture”.Pub. L. 94–561

Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 94–561section 5 of Pub. L. 94–561section 5313 of Title 5Oct. 19, 1976

Status of Incumbent Under Secretary of Agriculture, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–561, § 1(d)90 Stat. 2643Oct. 19, 1976“The officer occupying the position of Under Secretary of Agriculture, on the date of enactment of this Act [], may assume the duties of the Deputy Secretary of Agriculture. The individual assuming such duties shall not be required to be reappointed by reason of the enactment of this Act.”Oct. 19, 1976

Transfer of FunctionsFunctions of all officers, agencies, and employees of Department of Agriculture transferred, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of Agriculture by 1953, Reorg. Plan No. 2, § 1, eff. , 18 F.R. 3219, , set out as a note under .June 4, 195367 Stat. 633section 2201 of this title
